sql:
SELECT c.region AS region, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Net revenue by region, Q1 2026 (last quarter): West leads at $523.4K; Northeast trails at $310.7K (33% of the shown total).

sql:
SELECT p.category AS category, SUM(i.net_revenue - i.total_cost) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Gross margin by category, 2025: Electronics leads at $496.0K; Grocery trails at $45.9K (28% of the shown total).

sql:
SELECT p.category AS category, 100.0 * SUM(i.net_revenue - i.total_cost) / NULLIF(SUM(i.net_revenue), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Gross margin % by category, 2025: Beauty leads at 56.0%; Grocery trails at 28.8%.

sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
narration: Net revenue by month, 2025: total $4.39M across 12 months — peak 2025-12 at $606.9K, +135.8% first-to-last.

sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
narration: Net revenue by month, all time (2024 → today): total $9.23M across 30 months — peak 2026-05 at $635.8K, +3494.9% first-to-last.

sql:
SELECT o.channel AS channel, SUM(i.net_revenue) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.order_id), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Average order value by channel, 2026 YTD: web leads at $237.20; mobile trails at $229.18.

sql:
SELECT o.channel AS channel, COUNT(DISTINCT i.order_id) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-10-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Orders by channel, Q4 2025: mobile leads at 2,390; store trails at 2,053 (36% of the shown total).

q: top 5 products by revenue last quarter
sql:
SELECT p.product_name AS product, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 5
narration: Net revenue by product, Q1 2026 (last quarter): Atlas Charger leads at $33.5K; Cedar Headphones trails at $22.9K (25% of the shown total).

sql:
SELECT p.product_name AS product, SUM(i.qty) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
narration: Units sold by product, 2025: Sable Sneakers leads at 251; Cedar Mirror trails at 230 (11% of the shown total).

sql:
SELECT SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
narration: Net revenue, Q2 2026: $1.80M.

q: revenue this quarter vs last quarter
sql:
SELECT SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-04-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
narration: Net revenue, Q2 2026 (this quarter): $1.80M. That's +13.0% vs previous period ($1.59M).

sql:
SELECT SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
narration: Net revenue, 2026 YTD: $3.38M. That's +89.2% vs same period, prior year ($1.78M).

sql:
SELECT SUM(i.net_revenue) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.order_id), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
narration: Average order value, 2025: $229.47. That's -0.3% vs same period, prior year ($230.24).

sql:
SELECT p.category AS category, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN i.returned = 1 THEN i.qty ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Return rate (units) by category, 2025: Electronics leads at 12.4%; Grocery trails at 1.2%.

sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, 100.0 * SUM(i.discount_amt) / NULLIF(SUM(i.gross_revenue), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
narration: Discount rate by month, 2025: average 3.8% across 12 months — peak 2025-11 at 9.1%, +1.0% first-to-last.

sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.first_order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND c.first_order_date <= '2026-12-31' THEN o.customer_id END) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-12-31' AND c.customer_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
narration: New customers by month, 2026: total 1,421 across 6 months — peak 2026-06 at 380, +216.7% first-to-last.

sql:
SELECT c.segment AS segment, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Active customers by segment, Q1 2026 (last quarter): consumer leads at 2,341; vip trails at 159 (74% of the shown total).

q: revenue per customer by segment in 2025
sql:
SELECT c.segment AS segment, SUM(i.net_revenue) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Revenue per customer by segment, 2025: vip leads at $2,046.09; business trails at $1,196.14.

sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31' AND p.category = 'Electronics'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
narration: Net revenue · Electronics by month, 2025: total $1.42M across 12 months — peak 2025-12 at $193.7K, +138.5% first-to-last.

q: revenue in the west by channel in 2025

SELECT o.channel AS channel, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31' AND c.region = 'West'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC

sql:
SELECT SUM(i.net_revenue) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.order_id), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-03-31' AND c.segment = 'vip'

sql:
SELECT p.category AS category, SUM(i.qty) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-05-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-05-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC

sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.order_id) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-11-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-11-30'
narration: Orders, November 2025: 2,101.

sql:
SELECT o.channel AS channel, 100.0 * SUM(i.net_revenue - i.total_cost) / NULLIF(SUM(i.net_revenue), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
narration: Gross margin % by channel, last 6 months: mobile leads at 40.9%; store trails at 40.8%.

sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y', o.order_date) || '-Q' || ((CAST(strftime('%m', o.order_date) AS INTEGER) + 2) / 3) AS quarter, SUM(i.net_revenue - i.total_cost) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
narration: Gross margin by quarter, all time (2024 → today): total $3.75M across 10 quarters — peak 2026-Q2 at $735.7K, +1563.7% first-to-last.

sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y', o.order_date) AS year, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
narration: Net revenue by year, all time (2024 → today): total $9.23M across 3 years — peak 2025 at $4.39M, +129.9% first-to-last.

q: top 3 categories by gross margin ytd
sql:
SELECT p.category AS category, SUM(i.net_revenue - i.total_cost) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 3
narration: Gross margin by category, 2026 YTD: Electronics leads at $388.6K; Apparel trails at $231.2K (40% of the shown total).

q: return rate for electronics in 2025 vs prior year
sql:
SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN i.returned = 1 THEN i.qty ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2025-12-31' AND p.category = 'Electronics'
narration: Return rate (units) · Electronics, 2025: 12.4%. That's +2.5% vs same period, prior year (12.1%).

q: best sellers by revenue in june 2026
sql:
SELECT p.product_name AS product, SUM(i.net_revenue) AS value
FROM fact_order_items i JOIN fact_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dim_product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2026-06-01' AND o.order_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
narration: Net revenue by product, June 2026: Ember Earbuds leads at $12.4K; Aurora Router trails at $7.7K (13% of the shown total).
